## What does this change?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Data quality fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs / config

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] If valuation math changed — tests added or updated in `valuation.test.ts`
- [ ] No new dependencies added without discussion (open an issue first)
